product_overview: An Expo Router app for users to create accounts, sign in, and manage car records. Authenticated users can register cars and view a Firestore-backed car listing.
core_goals: Create a new user account with required credentials
Sign in with an existing email and password
Navigate through authenticated areas after login
Register a car with brand, model, and year
Review the list of saved cars

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Allows new users to create a Firebase Authentication account with required profile and login fields.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Enter name -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Enter password confirmation -> Submit the signup form -> See validation alerts for missing fields, invalid email, weak password, or mismatched confirmation
Navigate to /signup -> Enter name -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Enter password confirmation -> Submit the signup form -> Return to the login screen after successful account creation

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows existing users to sign in with email and password using Firebase Authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See validation alerts for missing or invalid credentials
Navigate to / -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See the home screen after successful login

features.name: Authenticated Home
features.description: Shows the signed-in user's email and provides navigation to car registration, car listing, and sign out.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> View the current account email -> Open the car listing screen
Navigate to /home -> View the current account email -> Open the car registration screen
Navigate to /home -> View the current account email -> Sign out -> Return to the login screen

features.name: Car Registration
features.description: Lets authenticated users save a new car record with brand, model, and year in Firestore under their user account.
user_flows: Navigate to /cadastro -> Enter brand -> Enter model -> Enter year -> Submit the car registration form -> See success feedback after the car is saved
Navigate to /cadastro -> Leave one or more required fields blank -> Submit the car registration form -> See validation alert for missing required fields
Navigate to /cadastro -> Enter brand -> Enter model -> Enter year -> Return to the home screen

features.name: Car Listing
features.description: Displays cars loaded from Firestore for authenticated users, including record details and an empty state when no cars exist.
user_flows: Navigate to /listagem -> View the empty state when no cars are found
Navigate to /listagem -> View each car's brand, model, year, creator email, and creation date
Navigate to /listagem -> Return to the home screen

routes.description: Authenticated home screen with navigation and logout.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Users sign in with email and password using Firebase Authentication.
user_interactions: Enter an email address.
Enter a password.
Tap Entrar.
See validation alerts for missing or invalid credentials.
Navigate to the home screen after successful login.

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Users create a Firebase Authentication account with required name, email, password, and password confirmation fields.
user_interactions: Enter name, email, password, and password confirmation.
Tap Cadastrar.
See validation alerts for empty fields, invalid email, weak password, or mismatched confirmation.
Return to the login screen after successful signup.

features.name: Authenticated Home
features.description: Authenticated users see their email, navigate to car registration/listing, or sign out.
user_interactions: View current account email.
Tap Ver listagem to open the car list.
Tap Ir para cadastro to open the car registration form.
Tap Sair to sign out and return to login.

features.name: Car Registration
features.description: Authenticated users save a new car with brand, model, and year in Firestore under their user document.
user_interactions: Enter brand.
Enter model.
Enter year.
Tap Salvar cadastro.
See an alert when required fields are missing.
See success feedback after Firestore save.
Tap Voltar to return home.

features.name: Car Listing
features.description: Authenticated users view all cars loaded from Firestore collection group query ordered by creation date.
user_interactions: Open the listing screen.
View empty state when no cars are found.
View car brand, model, year, creator email, and creation date when records exist.
Tap Voltar to return home.

known_limitations.issue: Some validation helper tests reference sneakers while the current UI registers cars.
known_limitations.impact: Test coverage includes legacy domain logic that is not wired to the current car registration UI.

known_limitations.issue: Car year is required but not validated as a valid numeric year beyond numeric keyboard input.
known_limitations.impact: Invalid year values may be saved if entered through paste or non-mobile input behavior.

known_limitations.issue: Frontend testing of authenticated car flows requires valid Firebase credentials and Firestore access.
known_limitations.impact: Automated cloud tests may be limited without a seeded test account.
